steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage says “this rejection is evident in his series”—the blank verb must mean to reject.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Repudiate” means to reject or refuse to support something. The other three don't express rejection: “proclaims” announces, “foretells” predicts, and “recants” withdraws a belief you once held. That matches choice A — A is correct.
